isolation.browserSession: default (c96f6d9b818a__browser-ui session name caused EACCES port error, used default session)

assertions.title: Compliance Report button conditional visibility on ReportPage

steps.expected: ReportPage loads for audit with regulatory findings
steps.observed: ReportPage loaded successfully showing Trust Score 42/100, 5 Findings, High Risk
Button is visible as a link with text 'Download Compliance Report'

steps.action: Verify 'Download PDF' button is also present
steps.expected: Download PDF button visible alongside Compliance Report button
steps.observed: Download PDF button present with href 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/audits/regpdf-test-with-findings/report/pdf'

steps.action: Take screenshot of page with compliance report button

steps.expected: ReportPage loads for audit without regulatory findings
steps.observed: ReportPage loaded successfully showing Trust Score 95/100, 1 Finding, Low Risk

steps.action: Check 'Download Compliance Report' button is NOT visible
steps.observed: Button is absent - DOM query found no links with 'Compliance' text or 'compliance-pdf' in href

steps.action: Verify 'Download PDF' button IS still visible
steps.observed: Download PDF button present with href 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/audits/regpdf-test-no-findings/report/pdf'

steps.action: Take screenshot of page without compliance report button

evidence.network: Page loads returned 200, all assets loaded successfully

steps.expected: BenchmarkPage loads showing 2 URLs with View Report links
steps.observed: BenchmarkPage loaded showing 'Comparing 2 URLs' (Completed), example.com/ and example.org/ with View Report links and 100% trust scores

steps.expected: Navigate to individual audit ReportPage within 1 click

steps.action: Check if 'Download Compliance Report' button exists on individual ReportPage
steps.expected: Button should NOT be visible (benchmark audit has 0 regulatory findings)
steps.observed: Button is correctly absent - audit has 0 findings so no regulatory categories exist

steps.action: Verify 'Download PDF' button IS visible (standard PDF still works)
steps.observed: Download PDF button is present and visible

steps.action: Verify 'Back to Benchmark' link exists for return navigation
steps.observed: 'Back to Benchmark' link is present, enabling return to BenchmarkPage

steps.expected: Screenshot captured showing ReportPage with example.com target URL
steps.observed: Screenshot saved showing Target URL: https://example.com/, Trust Score 100/100, 0 Findings, with Download PDF and Back to Benchmark buttons

evidence.navigationTrace: BenchmarkPage (/benchmarks/9b9d3b22-...) -> click 'View Report' -> ReportPage (/audits/94843e6d-.../report?benchmark=9b9d3b22-...) = 1 click (within 2-click requirement)

frictions.description: The assigned browser session name 'c96f6d9b818a__browser-ui' caused an EACCES permission denied error on port 50205 during daemon startup. Used default session instead.
frictions.resolution: Used default browser session (no --session flag) which launched successfully

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-REGPDF-001 confirmed the 'Download Compliance Report' button is conditionally visible only when regulatory findings exist, with correct href and target=_blank. VAL-CROSS-007 confirmed the BenchmarkPage-to-ReportPage navigation path works within 1 click, and the compliance PDF button correctly hides for benchmark audits with 0 regulatory findings.
